subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the world! Fear ye the Ancient Lord Who hath appeared with the Most Great Name, and be not of the heedless ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل العالم اتقوا مالک القدم الذی ظهر بالاسم الاعظم و لاتکونوا من الغافلین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @personal instructions
